decisions.rationale: Sign-out is the app-session boundary and must reset the public onboarding controller plus its Mutations. This is the documented controller-to-controller command seam, not a read-model or widget dependency.
Account deletion completes through the public auth-session command seam so auth and onboarding flow state are cleared centrally. Moving that cleanup into Safety would duplicate session ownership.

The eight dependencies form one route projection: conversation, match and host-inquiry context, event/profile enrichment, share capability, and action pending state. The provider has no cycles and prevents the screen from assembling those waves itself.

The eighteen dependencies are a cohesive discovery aggregate spanning filters, viewer eligibility, memberships, participations, saves, internal and external supply, search, and club names. Splitting now would duplicate partial-loading and precedence logic; revisit if a second route needs a stable subset or fan-out rises above twenty.

This is a private auto-dispose adapter in a part file that narrows a Host route provider result. Moving it only to satisfy code generation would add a public generated symbol and another ownership file without changing the dependency boundary.
Existing manual auto-dispose family. Migrate with the next Clubs data-provider change so the family remains behaviorally identical and its override-heavy callers can be updated in one focused pass.
Existing manual auto-dispose clock provider. It is a straightforward codegen candidate but unrelated to current topology ownership fixes.
Existing manual auto-dispose recommendation family with many test overrides. Migrate in a dedicated Explore data pass rather than mixing generated-provider API churn into this graph-tooling pass.
Existing manual auto-dispose batched lookup family. Migrate with the next public-profile data pass and preserve per-query disposal and parallel lookup behavior.
GoRouter is the app integration root and listens only to the auth verification gate needed to refresh redirects. It does not import auth widgets or perform auth mutations.
